policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule regen-hf-models:
    block write file "data/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "python*"
    because "Do not manually edit data/hf_models.json; run python3 scripts/scrape_hf_models.py."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SCRAPER = file "scripts/scrape_hf_models.py"
  
  rule add-model-db:
    notify write file "scripts/scrape_hf_models.py" if AGENT
    block write file "data/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "python*"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if SCRAPER unless after exec "cargo" since write "scripts/scrape_hf_models.py"
    because "After model DB changes, run the scraper, verify data/hf_models.json, and run cargo build."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule new-filter-touchpoints:
    notify write file "tui_app.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "tui_events.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "tui_ui.rs" if AGENT
    because "When adding a filter, update App state, filtering, keybinding, UI widget, and status help together."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule cli-subcommand-touchpoints:
    notify write file "main.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "display.rs" if AGENT
    because "New CLI subcommands need a Commands variant, dispatch arm, and display.rs output helpers."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule dependency-review:
    notify write file "Cargo.toml" if AGENT
    notify write file "Cargo.lock" if AGENT
    because "Prefer well-maintained crates with minimal transitive dependencies."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule keep-sysinfo:
    notify write file "Cargo.toml" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*.rs" if AGENT
    because "Keep sysinfo as the system detection crate; do not replace it with raw platform calls."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule tui-stack-only:
    notify write file "Cargo.toml" if AGENT
    notify write file "Cargo.lock" if AGENT
    because "Use ratatui plus crossterm for the TUI stack; do not mix in termion or ncurses."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule clap-derive-cli:
    notify write file "main.rs" if AGENT
    notify write file "Cargo.toml" if AGENT
    because "Use clap with derive for CLI parsing; do not introduce manual argument parsing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule scraper-stdlib-only:
    kill exec "pip*" if AGENT
    notify write file "scripts/scrape_hf_models.py" if AGENT
    because "The Python scraper must stay stdlib-only; do not add pip dependencies."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source RUST = file "**/*.rs"
  
  rule common-cargo-tasks:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if RUST unless after exec "cargo" since write "**/*.rs"
    notify write file "data/hf_models.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "python*"
    because "Use the documented cargo build/run/check/fmt/clippy flow and refresh hf_models through the scraper."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule cargo-build-run:
    notify exec "make" if AGENT
    because "Build with cargo build and run with cargo run."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule stable-rust-only:
    kill exec "cargo" "+nightly" if AGENT
    kill exec "rustup" "nightly" if AGENT
    because "Use the stable Rust toolchain only; nightly features are not required."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule infrastructure-mcp-tools:
    notify exec "npm" "create" if AGENT
    notify exec "psql" if AGENT
    notify exec "supabase" if AGENT
    because "Use InsForge MCP tools for scaffolding, backend metadata, schema, storage, and functions."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule tailwind-v3-lock:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "package-lock.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "pnpm-lock.yaml" if AGENT
    because "Keep Tailwind CSS locked to 3.4; do not upgrade to v4."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule download-template-first:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "download-template"
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "download-template"
    because "Start installation by using the download-template MCP tool with backend URL and anon key."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule install-insforge-sdk:
    notify exec "npm" "install" if AGENT
    because "Install the SDK with npm install @insforge/sdk@latest."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule fetch-docs-before-code:
    block write file "**/*.ts" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "fetch-docs"
    block write file "**/*.tsx" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "fetch-docs"
    because "Fetch the latest InsForge SDK docs before writing or editing integration code."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule use-uv-package-manager:
    kill exec "pip*" if AGENT
    notify exec "python*" if AGENT
    notify write file "pyproject.toml" if AGENT
    because "Use uv add for dependencies, uv run for scripts, and pyproject.toml for dependency review."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PYCODE = file "**/*.py"
  
  rule tests-before-commit:
    block exec "git" "commit" if PYCODE unless after exec "uv" since write "**/*.py"
    because "Run uv run prek run --all-files before committing changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CONTRIB = file "CONTRIBUTING.md"
  
  rule release-checklist-first:
    block exec "gh" "workflow" if AGENT and not CONTRIB
    block exec "gh" "release" if AGENT and not CONTRIB
    notify exec "gh" "workflow" if CONTRIB
    because "Read CONTRIBUTING.md and share draft release notes before publishing or triggering release workflow."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source TEST_GUIDE = file "tests/**/README.md"
  
  rule e2e-readme-before-tests:
    notify write file "tests/**" if AGENT and not TEST_GUIDE
    because "For cross-language e2e tests, read the language-local README and align assumptions with current server and SDK behavior."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PYCODE = file "**/*.py"
  
  rule goal-driven-checks:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if PYCODE unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py"
    because "Define success criteria, add focused tests for behavior changes, and loop until checks pass or blockers are clear."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule align-visible-behavior:
    notify write file "specs/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "server/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "sdks/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    because "Keep specs, implementation, SDKs, docs, examples, config, and CLI behavior aligned for user-visible changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SPEC = file "specs/**"
  
  rule specs-consumer-alignment:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if SPEC unless after exec "pytest" since write "specs/**"
    notify write file "specs/**" if AGENT
    because "When changing specs, update or verify affected server, SDK, docs, and release outputs."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source KUBE = file "kubernetes/**"
  
  rule kubernetes-output-alignment:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if KUBE unless after exec "helm" since write "kubernetes/**"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if KUBE unless after exec "kustomize" since write "kubernetes/**"
    because "For CRD or Kubernetes public behavior changes, verify generated manifests, deployment output, integration, and docs."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SPEC = file "specs/**"
  
  rule regenerate-derived-outputs:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if SPEC unless after exec "make" since write "specs/**"
    notify write file "specs/**" if AGENT
    because "Regenerate derived outputs when the source-of-truth file changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PYCODE = file "**/*.py"
  
  rule tests-for-behavior-change:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if PYCODE unless after exec "pytest" since write "**/*.py"
    because "Update tests when behavior changes or bugs are fixed."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SERVER_GUIDE = file "server/AGENTS.md"
  
  rule server-guide-routing:
    notify write file "server/**" if AGENT and not SERVER_GUIDE
    because "Read server/AGENTS.md before server, lifecycle, sandbox creation, or user-visible server config changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule generated-output-not-only-fix:
    notify write file "**/generated/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*_pb2.py" if AGENT
    because "Do not edit generated output as the only fix; update the source of truth too."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule keep-change-scoped:
    notify write file "components/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "server/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "sdks/**" if AGENT
    because "Avoid mixing unrelated component work into the same change."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SDK_GUIDE = file "sdks/AGENTS.md"
  
  rule sdk-guide-routing:
    notify write file "sdks/**" if AGENT and not SDK_GUIDE
    because "Read sdks/AGENTS.md before SDK generation, handwritten adapters, or cross-language SDK alignment work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SPECS_GUIDE = file "specs/AGENTS.md"
  
  rule specs-guide-routing:
    notify write file "specs/**" if AGENT and not SPECS_GUIDE
    because "Read specs/AGENTS.md before API contract, schema, or example changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source KUBE_GUIDE = file "kubernetes/AGENTS.md"
  
  rule kubernetes-guide-routing:
    notify write file "kubernetes/**" if AGENT and not KUBE_GUIDE
    because "Read kubernetes/AGENTS.md before CRD, controller, Helm, Kustomize, pool, snapshot, or Kind e2e work."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SPECS_GUIDE = file "specs/AGENTS.md"
  
  rule cross-cutting-specs-first:
    notify write file "server/**" if AGENT and not SPECS_GUIDE
    notify write file "sdks/**" if AGENT and not SPECS_GUIDE
    because "For cross-cutting spec, server, and SDK changes, start with specs/AGENTS.md and then read affected guides."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source COMPONENT_DOC = file "components/**/README.md"
  source COMPONENT_DOC = file "components/**/DEVELOPMENT.md"
  
  rule component-local-docs:
    notify write file "components/**" if AGENT and not COMPONENT_DOC
    because "For runtime component changes, read the nearest README.md or DEVELOPMENT.md and keep APIs aligned with specs and SDKs."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CLI_README = file "cli/README.md"
  
  rule cli-readme-and-help:
    notify write file "cli/**" if AGENT and not CLI_README
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CLI_README unless after exec "pytest" since write "cli/**"
    because "For CLI changes, read cli/README.md and verify command help/output behavior with unit tests."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CODE = file "**/*.ts"
  
  rule gbrain-before-shipping:
    block exec "git" "push" if CODE unless after exec "bun" since write "**/*.ts"
    notify exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT
    because "Before shipping, run bun run ci:local or ci:local:diff and use the /ship skill, not a manual path."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule privacy-public-artifacts:
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "llms.txt" if AGENT
    notify write file "llms-full.txt" if AGENT
    because "Do not commit real people, company, or fund names into public artifacts; use generic placeholders."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule fork-llms-regeneration:
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "bun" since write "llms.txt"
    notify exec "git" "push" if AGENT unless after exec "bun" since write "llms-full.txt"
    because "If publishing a fork, regenerate llms.txt and llms-full.txt with your own LLMS_REPO_BASE first."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule gbrain-install-protocol:
    notify exec "gbrain" "init" if AGENT
    notify exec "gbrain" "post-upgrade" if AGENT
    because "After gbrain init or post-upgrade, relay the search-mode cost matrix and confirm the user's choice before continuing."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CONTRIBUTING = file "CONTRIBUTING.md"
  
  rule contributing-before-pr:
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT and not CONTRIBUTING
    notify write file "skills/**" if AGENT and not CONTRIBUTING
    because "Read CONTRIBUTING.md before creating a PR, adding a skill, or preparing a contribution."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule pr-hygiene-review:
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT unless after exec "git" since write "**"
    because "Before PR creation, show git diff upstream/main --stat HEAD and git log upstream/main..HEAD --oneline, then wait for approval."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source HOST = file "src/**"
  source RUNNER = file "container/agent-runner/src/**"
  
  rule nanoclaw-dev-checks:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if HOST unless after exec "pnpm" since write "src/**"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if RUNNER unless after exec "bun" since write "container/agent-runner/src/**"
    because "Run commands directly and use the documented pnpm, build, container, bun test, and typecheck flows for touched areas."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule minimum-release-age-approval:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "pnpm-lock.yaml" if AGENT
    because "Do not add minimumReleaseAgeExclude entries without human sign-off and an exact pinned version."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule only-built-dependencies-approval:
    notify write file "package.json" if AGENT
    notify write file "pnpm-lock.yaml" if AGENT
    because "Do not add packages to onlyBuiltDependencies without human approval."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule pnpm-frozen-lockfile:
    notify exec "pnpm" "install" if AGENT
    because "In CI, automation, and container builds, use pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; never run bare pnpm install there."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule agent-runner-deps-use-bun:
    notify write file "container/agent-runner/package.json" if AGENT
    notify exec "pnpm" "install" if AGENT
    because "For container/agent-runner runtime deps, edit package.json, run bun install there, and commit bun.lock; it is not a pnpm workspace."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule agent-runner-pin-deps:
    kill exec "bun" "update" if AGENT
    notify write file "container/agent-runner/package.json" if AGENT
    because "Check npm release dates and pin agent-runner runtime dependency bumps deliberately; never bun update blindly."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule agent-runner-bun-tests:
    notify write file "container/agent-runner/src/**" if AGENT
    notify exec "vitest" if AGENT
    because "Tests under container/agent-runner/src must import from bun:test, not vitest."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule runtime-node-cli-policy:
    kill exec "bun" "-g" if AGENT
    notify write file "Dockerfile" if AGENT
    notify write file "container/**/Dockerfile" if AGENT
    because "Runtime Node CLIs belong in the Dockerfile pnpm global install block with exact-version ARGs; do not use bun install -g."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule container-entrypoint-policy:
    notify write file "Dockerfile" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/container-runner.ts" if AGENT
    kill exec "tsc" if AGENT
    because "Keep the dynamic spawn as exec bun and do not reintroduce a tsc build step or /app/dist dependency."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source RUST = file "**/*.rs"
  
  rule clippy-clean:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if RUST unless after exec "cargo" since write "**/*.rs"
    because "Keep clippy clean with zero warnings before finishing Rust changes."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SUBSYS_SPEC = file "CLAUDE.md"
  source SUBSYS_SPEC = file "src/**/CLAUDE.md"
  source SUBSYS_SPEC = file "src/**/README.md"
  source SUBSYS_SPEC = file "src/NETWORK_SECURITY.md"
  source SUBSYS_SPEC = file "tests/e2e/CLAUDE.md"
  
  rule read-subsystem-spec:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT and not SUBSYS_SPEC
    notify write file "crates/**" if AGENT and not SUBSYS_SPEC
    notify write file "tests/e2e/**" if AGENT and not SUBSYS_SPEC
    because "Read the relevant subsystem spec before changing complex areas and treat repo specs as authoritative."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule db-backend-parity:
    notify write file "src/db/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "crates/**/db/**" if AGENT
    because "New persistence behavior must support both PostgreSQL and libSQL."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule db-trait-first:
    notify write file "src/db/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "crates/**/db/**" if AGENT
    because "Add DB operations to the shared DB trait first, then implement both backends."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule setup-readme-with-onboarding:
    notify write file "src/setup/**" if AGENT
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless after exec "git" since write "src/setup/README.md"
    because "If onboarding or setup behavior changes, update src/setup/README.md in the same branch."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule preserve-security-guarantees:
    notify write file "**/*auth*" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*cors*" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*secret*" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*rate*" if AGENT
    because "Do not weaken auth, CORS, body limits, rate limits, allowlists, or secret-handling guarantees."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule untrusted-containers-services:
    notify exec "docker" if AGENT
    notify connect endpoint "*" if AGENT
    because "Treat Docker containers and external services as untrusted."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule core-tool-rust-built-in:
    notify write file "src/tools/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/agent/**" if AGENT
    because "Use built-in Rust tools for core internal capabilities tightly coupled to the runtime."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule sandboxed-extensions-wasm:
    notify write file "src/tools/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/channels/**" if AGENT
    because "Use WASM tools or WASM channels for sandboxed extensions and plugin-style integrations."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule external-integrations-mcp:
    notify connect endpoint "*" if AGENT
    notify write file "src/tools/**" if AGENT
    because "Use MCP for external server integrations when the capability belongs outside the main binary."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source RUST = file "**/*.rs"
  
  rule docs-with-behavior:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if RUST
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT
    because "If behavior changes, update the relevant docs or specs in the same branch."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PARITY = file "FEATURE_PARITY.md"
  
  rule feature-parity-status:
    notify write file "src/**" if AGENT and not PARITY
    notify write file "crates/**" if AGENT and not PARITY
    because "If implementation status changes for a tracked feature, update FEATURE_PARITY.md in the same branch."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source PARITY = file "FEATURE_PARITY.md"
  
  rule check-feature-parity-before-pr:
    block exec "gh" "pr" if AGENT and not PARITY
    because "Check FEATURE_PARITY.md for needed status updates before opening a PR that changes feature behavior."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule avoid-churn-generated-edits:
    notify write file "**/generated/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*_pb.rs" if AGENT
    because "Avoid unrelated file churn and generated-file edits unless required."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule respect-dirty-worktree:
    kill exec "git" "reset" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "checkout" if AGENT
    kill exec "git" "restore" if AGENT
    because "Respect a dirty worktree and never revert user changes you did not make."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule before-finishing-doc-check:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT
    because "Before finishing, confirm whether FEATURE_PARITY.md, specs, API docs, or CHANGELOG.md need updates."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source RUST = file "**/*.rs"
  
  rule targeted-tests-before-finish:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if RUST unless after exec "cargo" since write "**/*.rs"
    because "Run the most targeted tests or checks that cover the change."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SECURITY = file "**/*auth*"
  source SECURITY = file "**/*secret*"
  source SECURITY = file "**/*network*"
  source SECURITY = file "**/*sandbox*"
  
  rule recheck-security-sensitive:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if SECURITY unless after exec "cargo" since write "**/*auth*"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if SECURITY unless after exec "cargo" since write "**/*secret*"
    because "Re-check security-sensitive paths when touching auth, secrets, network listeners, sandboxing, or approvals."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule mcp-workflow-memory:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_search"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_store"
    because "Use memory_search before work, swarm_init for coordination, then memory_store after successful execution."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule avoid-unnecessary-files:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Never create files unless absolutely necessary."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule prefer-existing-files:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Always prefer editing existing files over creating new ones."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-root-folder-saves:
    notify write file "*" if AGENT
    because "Never save new work to the repository root folder; place files in the proper project area."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source SECRET = file "**/.env"
  source SECRET = file "**/*secret*"
  
  rule no-secret-commits:
    block exec "git" "commit" if SECRET
    block write file "**/.env" if AGENT
    because "Never commit secrets or .env files."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule read-before-edit:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT
    because "Always read a file before editing it."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule learning-memory-tools:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_search"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_store"
    because "Use memory_search before tasks, memory_store after success, and the memory tools for learning patterns."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule self-learning-search-first:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_search"
    because "Before starting a task, search memory patterns with memory_search in the patterns namespace."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule mcp-learning-workflow:
    notify write file "**" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_search"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "memory_store"
    because "Learn with memory_search, coordinate with swarm_init, execute directly, then remember with memory_store."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source CODE = file "**/*.ts"
  source CODE = file "**/*.rs"
  
  rule ccusage-post-change-checks:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "pnpm" since write "**/*.ts"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if CODE unless after exec "pnpm" since write "**/*.rs"
    because "After code changes, run pnpm run format, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm run test."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule avoid-amend-by-default:
    block exec "git" "--amend" if AGENT
    because "Prefer stacked, small, revertable follow-up commits over git commit --amend unless explicitly requested."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule no-proactive-docs:
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT
    because "Do what was asked and do not proactively create documentation files unless explicitly requested."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule ccusage-skills-routing:
    notify write file "**/*.ts" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*.tsx" if AGENT
    notify write file "**/*.rs" if AGENT
    because "Use the relevant ccusage skills before repository work, including package, Rust, TypeScript, testing, docs, and PR skills."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source APP_GUIDE = file "apps/ccusage/CLAUDE.md"
  source DOCS_GUIDE = file "docs/CLAUDE.md"
  
  rule nearest-package-claude:
    notify write file "apps/ccusage/**" if AGENT and not APP_GUIDE
    notify write file "docs/**" if AGENT and not DOCS_GUIDE
    because "Check the nearest package-specific CLAUDE.md before editing package code."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule removed-wrapper-packages:
    block write file "**/ccusage-amp/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/ccusage-codex/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/ccusage-opencode/**" if AGENT
    block write file "**/ccusage-pi/**" if AGENT
    because "Standalone wrapper packages were removed; do not add docs, tests, or features promoting them."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule prefer-nix-shell-tools:
    notify exec "npm" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "cargo" "install" if AGENT
    notify exec "brew" "install" if AGENT
    notify write file "flake.nix" if AGENT
    because "Prefer Nix dev shell tools before ad hoc installs; add useful repeated tools to flake.nix."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  
  rule new-llm-provider-checklist:
    notify write file "backend/pkg/providers/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "pkg/providers/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "pkg/server/models/providers.go" if AGENT
    notify write file "pkg/config/config.go" if AGENT
    notify write file "backend/migrations/sql/**" if AGENT
    notify write file "frontend/src/components/icons/**" if AGENT
    because "A new LLM provider needs provider implementation, registration, validation, config, migration, icon, and schema/frontend updates."

version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"
  source GRAPH_SCHEMA = file "backend/pkg/graph/schema.graphqls"
  source FRONTEND_GQL = file "frontend/src/graphql/**"
  
  rule code-generation-after-schema:
    notify exec "git" "commit" if GRAPH_SCHEMA unless after exec "gqlgen" since write "backend/pkg/graph/schema.graphqls"
    notify exec "git" "commit" if FRONTEND_GQL unless after exec "npm" since write "frontend/src/graphql/**"
    notify write file "backend/**" if AGENT
    because "Regenerate gqlgen stubs, Swagger docs, or frontend GraphQL TypeScript types after modifying their source inputs."
